reviews.title: Don’t be as sceptical as I was.
reviews.content: The title really does sum it up, this is the first time I’ve ever bothered to follow up on a advert for a horoscope but just lately I’ve started questioning a lot of things that I’d previously just taken for granted as that’s what I had been told since I was a child and the reason I think is becouse I have started waking up , started appreciating things like nature and music even Art. So I did this and bearing in mind they only have my basic details (which I could have lied about) and my actual picture of my hand (the important part) this reading was so relevant and specific I am shocked. There are parts that would have been guessed wrong if they were guessed. All I can say is if your sensing things and noticing things different  go for it. 🙏🏻
reviews.author: Read me then decide
reviews.title_en: Don’t be as sceptical as I was.
reviews.content_en: The title really does sum it up, this is the first time I’ve ever bothered to follow up on a advert for a horoscope but just lately I’ve started questioning a lot of things that I’d previously just taken for granted as that’s what I had been told since I was a child and the reason I think is becouse I have started waking up , started appreciating things like nature and music even Art. So I did this and bearing in mind they only have my basic details (which I could have lied about) and my actual picture of my hand (the important part) this reading was so relevant and specific I am shocked. There are parts that would have been guessed wrong if they were guessed. All I can say is if your sensing things and noticing things different  go for it. 🙏🏻

reviews.title: Insightful and enlightening
reviews.content: I haven’t quite read all of my starseed text yet, but so far the horoscopes and the birth chart along with the palm reading have been pretty great and surprisingly accurate. I have not yet spoken to a psychic yet but there are a lot of them to choose from and they all seem very professional. I’m curious to find out more about myself as I open up this app for guidance.
reviews.author: Poison ivy 89
reviews.content_en: I haven’t quite read all of my starseed text yet, but so far the horoscopes and the birth chart along with the palm reading have been pretty great and surprisingly accurate. I have not yet spoken to a psychic yet but there are a lot of them to choose from and they all seem very professional. I’m curious to find out more about myself as I open up this app for guidance.

reviews.title: Takes money without permission. SCAM
reviews.content:
I tried to purchase one item which it flashed up with an offer offering me for $4.99 but then I have just seen on my bank statements it has taken 2 payments of $9.99!!! I have emailed them about this but received no response. How can people take money from your account you have definitely not approved?

I have already emailed despite their reply below ignoring this fact and the company show no effort to fix the issue and simply send back preplanned replies. Awful service, PayPal dispute started.
reviews.author: Holes94
reviews.content_en:
I tried to purchase one item which it flashed up with an offer offering me for $4.99 but then I have just seen on my bank statements it has taken 2 payments of $9.99!!! I have already emailed despite their reply below ignoring this fact and the company show no effort to fix the issue and simply send back preplanned replies. Awful service, PayPal dispute started.

reviews.title: Careful you’re not scammed into 40 bucks a month! Many have!
reviews.content: Not a bad app to access your daily horoscope - too many pop ups tho which is annoying. But I specifically declined my weekly payment of 9.99 to the extent they offered me a discount to 2.99 a week. I didn’t want it. Next thing you know I’m being charged 9.99 per week for their pro option - I didn’t notice until I stumbled into the receipts in my junk mail. I contacted them and was given some blurb that it’s shown on their sales page on their website (I’ve never visited their website I’ve only used the app) basically suggesting I’d not been remotely observant. Check the reviews. So many people get done in this way! It’s sneaky and VERY unclear (i believe intentionally) and still have no recollection of any of the confirmation pages they refer to that they mention. I kicked up a bit of a fuss on email and got my money back. So that’s the only positive thing I can add about the business side of this app.

reviews.title_en: Careful you’re not scammed into 40 bucks a month! Many have!

Next thing you know I’m being charged 9.99 per week for their pro option - I didn’t notice until I stumbled into the receipts in my junk mail. reviews.title: Beautiful app but disappointing setup
reviews.content: The app looks amazing and has so much potential, but honestly, it feels frustrating to use. Whatever I press — whether it’s “get your chart” or “find out what type of witch you are” — it’s all an extra charge. Literally everything is an additional cost. This creates a trapped feeling, like you can’t enjoy the app without constantly paying more. Why not just charge a bit more upfront and include all the features? The way it’s set up now feels like a cheap money-grab, which really takes away from what could otherwise be a great experience.
reviews.author: Mila Maurus
reviews.content_en: The app looks amazing and has so much potential, but honestly, it feels frustrating to use. Whatever I press — whether it’s “get your chart” or “find out what type of witch you are” — it’s all an extra charge. Literally everything is an additional cost. This creates a trapped feeling, like you can’t enjoy the app without constantly paying more. Why not just charge a bit more upfront and include all the features? The way it’s set up now feels like a cheap money-grab, which really takes away from what could otherwise be a great experience.

reviews.title: Why is it getting so expensive ?
reviews.content: The apps free features were so good and I used them daily, I read my horroscope daily and it was always spot on, I’m getting to a point tho where I no longer want to use it as even the explanation of my chart is now costing money ? The free guides also cost money ? And it’s all 10+ why not charge a couple of dollars at least because then I’d be tempted to buy but no way am I spending that much money on an app, I have a fitness app that’s costs me 2.59 and I pay that monthly and have done for 3 years, Nebula should take notes…

You have the people popping up to you acting as if they’re professionals and have a profession but really they are just reading your profile, your status and your horoscope. I’m just trying to add a little story to it which is false because they just want the money from the points and coins. you have some of them just pop up just so you can reply just so they can collect the coins and then they’ll say no more to you. It took £20 from my account. I did not know it was £20 after the free trial ridiculous. Do not download just go and get the free wine. I forgot what it’s called but it’s white and red. It’s more accurate and you don’t have to pay and it’s not fraud

reviews.title: Mysterious but definitely strong guidance
reviews.content: I did one palm reading that bought me to the app and to say the least whether it’s 100% real is not what matters. For every person that uses it or is thinking of it. The guidance it plays for you are genuine words of wisdom I think any person could benefit from. Of course do not take it as gospel but there is no harm in see the critiquing it gives to become a better version of ourself. The historical usage of such reading is prevalent across the world and I believe there is an element of clarity and direction rather than answers, to be gained from it. From first use I definitely give it a four if I begin to use it increasingly I think it could be a 5*

I used to have three other horoscope apps on my phone and used to start my day by reading daily horoscopes from each of them. reviews.title: It keeps trying to charge me
reviews.content: I tried the app out of curiosity and paid the 1 Euro recommendation to support them, unaware they are actually signing me up for a 39 Euros/M subscription, no indication on screen that they’re setting me up for subscription. I have since deleted my account but I keep receiving alerts for withdrawal attempts! I have locked my card and removed it from Apple Pay but still receive daily attempts. Can’t login to possibly cancel subscription, as it says account deleted. Can’t create a new account under the same email as it says account exists and there is no customer support. At this point I have no option other than cancelling my card.
reviews.author: A M I N K

Can’t login to possibly cancel subscription, as it says account deleted. Can’t create a new account under the same email as it says account exists and there is no customer support. At this point I have no option other than cancelling my card.

reviews.title: Used to be good, now it’s a con
reviews.content: I’ve had this app for years, it used to be really good. You’d be able to access your birth chart at any time, do the comparability matches as much as you want etc. I’ve just logged in for the first time in a while and everything is locked behind a paywall. You want your birth chart? Oh you have to wait 10 minutes for that unless you pay, oh you want to do a comparability check, you can but to read the results you have to pay or invite the person to the app. This is really shame as the app was really good, but now it’s obvious they just care about money so I will need to download a new one that doesn’t lock everything behind a pay wall

reviews.content:
Don’t be fooled by nebula like my sister. This app is hypocritic and fraud. They just play with the mind of people and deduct money from other’s account unusually. They tell for small amounts of money but later they take off in huge amount without the knowing of card’s owner. So its a big fraud application I have ever seen and heard. This application withdrawn around $400 from my sister’s master card which is really a ridiculous activity and a cyber crime……They are doing bad and playing with people’s feelings in the name of astrology… So pathetic… Shame on owner of Nebula…😡😡😡 
At the end,, you’ll gonna get your karma back don’t worry….😒😡

reviews.title: Misleading ads and Inaccurate Information
reviews.content:
If you've downloaded this app after seeing Instagram ads promising personalised insights into archetypes, I feel for you. I did the same thing, paid money for it and received two PDFs: one not even remotely personalised, and one with pictures of my hand next to very generic information.
You're not going to get what you've been promised.

As for the information in the app, the astrological information it brought up for me is very inaccurate. The ascendant is one of the most important points in a birth chart, and the app is claiming that mine is Virgo when it is in fact Leo. These are vastly different signs, so there's clearly something wrong with the AI.
reviews.author: 32BitWitch
reviews.content_en:
If you've downloaded this app after seeing Instagram ads promising personalised insights into archetypes, I feel for you. I did the same thing, paid money for it and received two PDFs: one not even remotely personalised, and one with pictures of my hand next to very generic information.
You're not going to get what you've been promised.

As for the information in the app, the astrological information it brought up for me is very inaccurate. The ascendant is one of the most important points in a birth chart, and the app is claiming that mine is Virgo when it is in fact Leo. These are vastly different signs, so there's clearly something wrong with the AI.

reviews.title: Not Sure Yet
reviews.content: I have to say the depiction of him, at least in his approaches to our relationship and what id be lookong for, feel pretty spot on although i’m aware some of this information i volunteered willingly so the rest might be easy to piece together. i’m trying not to be overly cynical but it’s difficult when it’s ingrained in you from past trauma. At best, it’s giving me clarity about the boundaries and qualities i need and find non negotiable, so that at least is very helpful. no more settling for emotionally barren and unsatisfying relationship dynamics- if he comes, god wills it to be and if he doesn’t, so be it. but im done in settling for less!

reviews.title: Free trial doesn’t show everything
reviews.content: Not going to lie, apps like this are not worth the money or investing your confidence or time in. There is very limited access & options to explore on a free trial. The app really doesn’t allow you to truly understand your sign or personality because it’s all been prewritten and working on predefined characteristics instead of very persona results. The summaries also seem very simplistic and almost superficial from what I am allowed to see. I would recommend a personal astrologer over an app if you want far more insight and personalized readings.
reviews.author: ToriCeylon
reviews.content_en: Not going to lie, apps like this are not worth the money or investing your confidence or time in. There is very limited access & options to explore on a free trial. The app really doesn’t allow you to truly understand your sign or personality because it’s all been prewritten and working on predefined characteristics instead of very persona results. The summaries also seem very simplistic and almost superficial from what I am allowed to see. I would recommend a personal astrologer over an app if you want far more insight and personalized readings.

reviews.content_en: I'm pleasantly surprised at how many features match. I find the tips on how to use and use them helpful.

reviews.title: DO NOT PAY THE £1
reviews.content: The app’s adverts all over social media tell you they’ll do a soulmate reading for £1. Know that this also sets you up for an extra £50 charge a week later as the £1 isn’t a one time charge for a single reading but a discounted  premium price. This is shown in their example of fine print but on the page you go through on the ads it will not tell you this and the reminder goes straight to junk mail. Besides this very deceptive and scammy marketing technique, I found my reading very confusing and it seemed like i was just being told - this is how to read your own palm and what it means even though it supposedly scanned my palm for me - what is the point in paying for a palm reading if I’m doing it myself with your generic guide? The whole app is also run by AI so if that is important to you avoid this app. I’ve seen numerous people who had the same problem woth being charged a monthly sub after the £1 charge so don’t get caught in the same issue friends!

reviews.content_en: The app’s adverts all over social media tell you they’ll do a soulmate reading for £1. Know that this also sets you up for an extra £50 charge a week later as the £1 isn’t a one time charge for a single reading but a discounted  premium price. This is shown in their example of fine print but on the page you go through on the ads it will not tell you this and the reminder goes straight to junk mail. Besides this very deceptive and scammy marketing technique, I found my reading very confusing and it seemed like i was just being told - this is how to read your own palm and what it means even though it supposedly scanned my palm for me - what is the point in paying for a palm reading if I’m doing it myself with your generic guide? reviews.title: Excellent and Accurate
reviews.content: The reading I had was spot on, explained to me what was currently happening in my life, and told me things only I knew.  Advised me of my future til Jan 2025 and he even went beyond that.  Explained some promising and exciting news for my future and would defo recommend this reader.  Give direct questions re career, business, love, and money and ask for an in-depth reading over a period of time and you will not be disappointed.  Will get another reading in 6 months time.  Thank you

reviews.title: Why are you taking money from my bank account?????
reviews.content: Downloaded this app , then cancelled and deleted because it wasn’t what I wanted. Now they are taking money from my bank account without my plans I can’t get them to stop!! Be very careful, this app is a fraud and a scam. I contacted Nebula and, despite assuring me they would stop taking money from my account, for the third month, they are taking £34 (last month it was over £70, I’ve never used it) I am a pensioner and cannot afford for these scammers taking large amounts of money from me with nothing to show for it. PLEASE STOP DOING THIS ARSEHOLES

reviews.title: Soo much info, love it!!❤️💖
reviews.content: So I first looked at this app and thought nah it’s like any old app but then saw one of my fav people doing an ad for it! So I decided to get it and I don’t regret it at all cause I’ve been studying astrology for nearly 2 years by myself and it’s time because I kinda need some help so this is really helpful! And I love the background the design and how addictive it is!! If ur reading my review thank you for making this app!! And I recommend this to anyone who is interested in astrology or is new to the family!!🥰💖♉️

reviews.title: Unexpected Joy! 💖
reviews.content:
I downloaded the app on a whim. I wanted to find out my spirit animal, which was very cool and felt right. 

There was a lovely meditation that I think I’ll come back to, I think it will help me focus and build confidence. 

Best of all, the palmistry reading  was a really wonderful and insightful experience that brought me reassurance and confirmation. It showed me how all the different aspects of my personality and life experience don’t make me a mess, but actually weave together in a way I was starting to appreciate already. But the reading really clarified and reinforced some of my self reflections, and also surprised and amused me!

reviews.title: Great app!
reviews.content: I’ve really enjoyed this app so far! I haven’t subscribed for the full app but have got the information I wanted and find it useful and totally fascinating! I love all to do with astrology and tarot cards and this covers so much. It even gives you the chance to have 3min free chats with tarot readers too (included in the price you pay). I’m delighted to know my spirit animal (it’s a black cat which sits right with me!) and lots of other information including your daily horoscope! You can go on to subscribe if you wish but there is no pressure from the company! I’m happy I took up the chance to experience this app! Thank you Nebula 🐈‍⬛

reviews.title: Money pit app- trapped with continuous payments even after you stop using the app:
reviews.content:
This app is intriguing but at every turn they attempt to take your money and don’t get me started on the subscriptions. It’s so well hidden you cannot easily unsubscribe. So you are stuck paying for a non service. I spoke to a medium/ advisor. She was believable and intriguing but after paying £20 I got 5 mins to ask her questions until they could take more money from me. I just want to delete the app and unsubscribe from all fees, Nebula. 

My point is I paid for that ladies service. Ok. However continuous payments that are so difficult to cancel especially when you stop using the app. Who wants to pay for a service they are not using. I spent days on the app just trying to cancel my payment. That of the dodgy part. Avoid this app like the plague!

Signed an unhappy customer!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.content: Recently, I reached out to Nebula with a concern about their service. I was thoroughly impressed by how swiftly and efficiently their customer service team addressed my issue. The response was not only quick but also very effective, completely resolving my concerns. This positive experience has significantly boosted my confidence in Nebula’s commitment to customer satisfaction. Highly recommend for their exceptional customer service!

reviews.title: Avoid
reviews.content:
As someone else says on their review it’s totally misleading.  I too paid 1euro for a trial and find myself locked in to a monthly subscription.  Which - as Nebula rightly say - is there in the small print.  But it’s not clear.  I cannot now access my account to cancel this subscription. Despite numerous emails and being told endless times to use the Help Bot.  Which now doesn’t respond to me.
Not really impressed with the initial palmistry either.  I have an injury to my hand which meant my thumb wasn’t included in my photo.  And yet it was still commented on ……

reviews.title: Auto renewed after deleting account
reviews.content: Nebula auto renewed after deleting account. Check on IPhone if I was subscribed before deleting app to cancel subscription. Nothing there. Deleted app. Then get charged 39 euros for subscription. Then can’t log in to nebula to to cancel subscription. Have tried through the bot now… after being posed the same questions countless times. Still can’t log in to check if subscription is actually cancelled. while they supply generic content. It was more information than any kind of reading when I did the trial initially. That’s why I tried to u subscribe and delete. Basically a scam playing off people’s emotions and will to want and do better. Don’t download. UPDATE: keeps saying nickname for review is taken… maybe because it’s an honest review

reviews.content: These people are only out for your money. They promise to send a sketch of your soulmate and will not send . They will promise you three minutes of chat time for free and will take forever to answer one question so that you will pay for their services. If you see anything from them that says free, run. Because a dollar here and there and before you realise, all your money is gone. They’re not what they advertise to be…beware!

reviews.title: Sneaky subscription service WITHOUT CONSENT
reviews.content:
I paid for one report and they have signed me up for a weekly subscription service of 9.99 USD. I received no email confirmation of the subscription service either. Instead after paying for the report I received an email saying that the premium feature is automatically unlocked once I downloaded the email. Nowhere did I have to consent to a subscription nor had any control of unlocking premium features. 
This is no way to run a business and intentionally misleading.
reviews.author: *CharlesX*
reviews.content_en:
I paid for one report and they have signed me up for a weekly subscription service of 9.99 USD. I received no email confirmation of the subscription service either. Instead after paying for the report I received an email saying that the premium feature is automatically unlocked once I downloaded the email. Nowhere did I have to consent to a subscription nor had any control of unlocking premium features. 
This is no way to run a business and intentionally misleading.

reviews.title: Beware, Scam
reviews.content:
This app is a scam. If I could give it 0 stars I would. I signed up via an instagram post and when I downloaded the app it was just full of AI generated bots offering readings, the initial free ‘reading’ based on the information I gave it was inaccurate. It didn’t even get my ascending sign correct let alone anything else. 
I cancelled my subscription. So imagine my shock to find I’ve had £33 taken from my bank account without my permission with no active subscription. When I contacted them they have offered me 300 credits for psychic readings…. 
I told them I wanted my money back as I didn’t want the service and didn’t use it. They’ve agreed a refund but I have to wait 10-15 days to hopefully find out if Barb from their customer service team is an actual person or another AI bot. Be very wary when downloading this.
reviews.author: louisedxnielle
reviews.content_en:
This app is a scam. If I could give it 0 stars I would. I signed up via an instagram post and when I downloaded the app it was just full of AI generated bots offering readings, the initial free ‘reading’ based on the information I gave it was inaccurate. It didn’t even get my ascending sign correct let alone anything else. 
I cancelled my subscription. So imagine my shock to find I’ve had £33 taken from my bank account without my permission with no active subscription. When I contacted them they have offered me 300 credits for psychic readings…. 
I told them I wanted my money back as I didn’t want the service and didn’t use it. They’ve agreed a refund but I have to wait 10-15 days to hopefully find out if Barb from their customer service team is an actual person or another AI bot. Be very wary when downloading this.

reviews.title: Subscription scam buyers beware!!!
reviews.content: Done the quiz was intrigued in the results, you have to download the app to get them. Kept saying no to subscription, they then say you have to get the results in daily increments to keep you there and they are constantly trying to sell readings/psychics. I didn’t sign use any of them. I did look at the free courses on chakras and feminine energy. Week later charged £37, the bank is dealing with it. Tried contacting them but the bot is useless/confusing/complicated and eventually makes you email them. Waiting on a response. No where on app or website does it say I have a subscription or signed up for one. So angry I fell for this.

 I do not have an account and they took a large unauthorised amount of money from my bank. Absolute nightmare. Do not download this app!

reviews.title: DO NOT GET INVOLVED - AVOID
reviews.content: This is a complete scam. Like others, I noticed this app advertised on Facebook and was enticed by the £1 trial to read my horoscope which, I expected, was to be forwarded by email. However, you then have to download the app to see your purchase and you are already tied in to a monthly subscription of £50, without any knowledge, that you cannot get out of, either via the App Store, your bank or Apple Pay. You have to contact the company and ask if they can cancel the subscription you did not know you had signed up for, and they happily oblige (time will tell) although, by this time, they have already taken over £100 from you in the space of one month. Quite shocking.

reviews.title: Scam!
reviews.content:
I paid £1 with the full intention of cancelling before the week trial was up. I could not find how to cancel the subscription on my phone or either the app or website, so I emailed Nebula. This was on 11th January, and I received a reply stating that”For subscription cancellations, please note that our team will handle this for you and you will receive confirmation via email shortly.”

I then sent a follow up email on 20th January when I had noticed that £45 had been taken out of my account. I have not received a response from either email, therefore I have decided to post a review in the hopes that somebody will see my review and will have the decency to cancel my subscription and refund me the £45 they took from me!

I will continue posting negative reviews until the above has been completed!

reviews.title: Pretty accurate
reviews.content:
I’m fairly experienced with these type of quizzes and tests so I feel qualified to give a non biased opinion. 
I have no negative feedback only constructive criticism so you can build on it. I personally believe that I can select more than one of the multiple choice answers and that it would be beneficial to have an extra option for this. Or be able to select more than one of the staple answers. 
Just my thoughts though and I’m very happy with the results as it is. I’m just very particular and always looking for ways to improve everything!! 
Thanks for your service to humanity and Mother Earth and humanity in general xx peace and love to all xx

I have no negative feedback only constructive criticism so you can build on it. I personally believe that I can select more than one of the multiple choice answers and that it would be beneficial to have an extra option for this. Or be able to select more than one of the staple answers. 
Just my thoughts though and I’m very happy with the results as it is. I’m just very particular and always looking for ways to improve everything!!

reviews.content: I had a really great experience with this horoscope reading. It was surprisingly accurate, detailed, and resonated deeply with my current situation. I truly appreciated the time and effort put into it, and I would definitely recommend this service to anyone looking for meaningful insight and guidance. Thank you for such an amazing experience!

reviews.title: App technical glitch - won’t refund- added credits instead
reviews.content:
The app had a technical glitch and just to be on the safe side I checked my account. I messaged straightaway stating that the extra attempts were not showing, and it was not to purchase any credits in that amount. Instead of refunding, they added the credits, whilst admitting there was a technical glitch and now the support agent is awol. 
Total scam and need to get the money back, now conveniently they’re not replying. Total joke and scam.
Update: they are saying they will not refund. Despite the fact I followed the info online - submitted the evidence and they admitted a technical error. I want my refund - I do not want the credits.
Last Update: After stating it was theft, and stating it was their error - and also looking up and getting the legal and bank routes of attempting to reimburse the loss - they confirmed they will refund the money. Despite it being online - as a consumer we are protected by consumer rights especially on unfair practices when the issue is a technical fault. Depending on the country you are in. Lots of info online about it. 
But it seems I’ve given this app too many chances. Not sure why I’m still trying. That was unnecessarily difficult and stressful.

reviews.title: SCAM
reviews.content: This app is a complete rip off and the good reviews are fake. They have 2 stars on google. They steal your money. They pretend you are getting a 3 day trial but take the money anyway. Then if you ask for a refund they offer you the app instead! What a disgusting company. Apple is even worse for allowing this app to be on here. They don’t refund you either cos they are the worst and don’t care about consumers. Then the customer service is AI bots who don’t even listen. DO NOT DOWNLOAD THIS. Also you have to pay for everything in the app even if you are a subscriber and they have about 60 options of payment on the drop down from £2 a week to almost £200 a year or 79 a month. Total scam and on top of that. The adverts are false you don’t get the thing they hook you in on. AVOID.

reviews.title: SCAM. DO NOT DOWNLOAD
reviews.content: I downloaded this app on a trial and have been trying to cancel my subscription for months. They’re is no option on the app or online to cancel your subscription and have tried to contact multiple times and nothing has been rectified. I have deleted the app after various attempts to contact them to cancel the subscription but I have now been charged $80 in one instalment and a further $40 within the space of an hour today. I hope someone from this company sees this and stops this because I’m sure I’m not the only one affected by this extremely concerning issue.

reviews.title: Misleading subscription model
reviews.content:
I came across this app via a Facebook ad and took the quiz out of curiosity. I opted for the free trial, paying $1 to access my results, with no intention of subscribing to their premium services.
Knowing how repeat subscriptions often work, I checked both my App Store subscriptions and phone settings, no active subscription appeared. To my shock, I was later charged €39.
When I contacted support, even their own web bot confirmed I had no active subscription. I then received a long-winded email explaining why their subscription doesn’t show up in the App Store or phone settings. To make matters worse, I was told the policy was “very clearly” stated, buried, no doubt, in fine print.
With no accessible way to view or cancel the subscription, it feels like this is designed to catch out unsuspecting customers. A quick way to make money, but an even faster way to lose trust.
reviews.author: Kiki8825
reviews.content_en:
I came across this app via a Facebook ad and took the quiz out of curiosity. I opted for the free trial, paying $1 to access my results, with no intention of subscribing to their premium services.
Knowing how repeat subscriptions often work, I checked both my App Store subscriptions and phone settings, no active subscription appeared. To my shock, I was later charged €39.
When I contacted support, even their own web bot confirmed I had no active subscription. I then received a long-winded email explaining why their subscription doesn’t show up in the App Store or phone settings. To make matters worse, I was told the policy was “very clearly” stated, buried, no doubt, in fine print.
With no accessible way to view or cancel the subscription, it feels like this is designed to catch out unsuspecting customers. A quick way to make money, but an even faster way to lose trust.

reviews.title_en: Be careful, there are hidden cost traps!!!

I bought something for 1,- through a promotion and therefore had to download this app. After a week, 42.99 was deducted from me via Paypal without my consent, and I no longer had the app! I hope I get the money back through Paypal Buyer Protection!
Hands off !

reviews.content: I absolutely love this app!!!! I always felt skeptical about astrology, since the descriptions of my zodiac sign’s traits on various websites weren’t really true for me, but with Nebula, I learned about my ascendent and my planets’ houses, and a whole astrology thing started to make so much more sense. This app really inspired me to do more self-reflection and helped to find out why I did certain things and made certain choices in life.

reviews.title: Scam
reviews.content: Took a test for fun and paid $1 for a report. Paid with Apple Pay and at no point did it say that doing this would sign me up for a $39 subscription. I’m fact it asked me many times if I wanted a subscription or add ons and I said no. But it still seems to have signed me up for a subscription. I double checked emails and no where did it say I had make a subscription so it’s lucky I checked to be able to cancel it. Absolutely disgusting. Also the report I got was also useless as it doesn’t really say anything about me personally and then just wants you to pay to talk to a psychic.

reviews.title: Abzocke - eigentlich Null Sterne!
reviews.content:
Achtung Abzocke! Bitte aufpassen, wenn man bei dieser unseriösen Firma etwas bezahlt! Es wird mit der ersten Zahlung ungewollt / ungefragt ein Abo mit einer Einzugsermächtigung eingerichtet! So kann die Firma mindestens einen Jahresbeitrag rechtssicher abbuchen. Achtet darauf, dass keine Verknüpfung mit eurer Zahlungsquelle ausgelöst wird!!!! 
Zudem ist die Art der „Dienstleistung“ mehr als fraglich, unseriös und maximal beliebig interpretierbar.
reviews.author: DiggiSi
reviews.content_en:
Beware of rip-offs! Please be careful when paying something to this dubious company! With the first payment, a subscription with a direct debit authorization is set up unintentionally / without being asked! This means the company can debit at least one annual fee in a legally secure manner. Make sure that no link is triggered with your payment source!!!! 
In addition, the type of “service” is more than questionable, dubious and can be interpreted in a maximum of arbitrary ways.

reviews.title: Be careful, unclear payment charge’s.
reviews.content: I am in no way happy with the payment details on this app. I thought I was buying a horoscope, next minute I’m being charged for a 2 week trial then I somehow wandered into paying nearly €50 that I thought was a lifetime membership but turned out not to be. I had to consult my PayPal sales invoice to figure out that it was for a 30 min consult which is certainly not what I was expecting, I will not be renewing any subscription and have already turned off auto-renew before it has a chance to take any more of my hard earned money.
